title: A Look At Rocket Lab (RKLB) Valuation After US$3b Equity Program And US$90m Space Force Contract
description:
Rocket Lab (RKLB) is back in focus after two contrasting announcements: a plan to raise up to US$3b via an at the market equity program, and a new US$90m U.S. Space Force satellite contract.
See our latest analysis for Rocket Lab.
The stock has been volatile around these headlines, with dilution concerns from the US$3b at the market program pulling against optimism from the new US$90m Space Force deal and recent successful missions. At the same time, the 30 day share price return of 70.38%...

title: Rocket Lab Wins Space Force Deal And Steps Deeper Into Defense Contracts
description:
Rocket Lab (NasdaqGS:RKLB) has been awarded a US$90 million contract as prime contractor for a U.S. Space Force geostationary satellite mission.
The deal comes through the Space Systems Command and marks Rocket Lab's first major geostationary satellite contract.
This award expands Rocket Lab's role beyond launch services into end to end satellite production and operations for U.S. government customers.

For investors tracking space and defense exposure, this contract positions Rocket Lab as...
